title: Rats Harvests
description: Automation and building-focused modpack with machines, food, and more — featuring Rats!
body:
# Ratos e Receitas!

![Rats Harvest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3323a98c4237c2175e9a906b6e2c8e4ef0480c36.png)

**Br**

Um modpack cheio de exploração, farms, aldeões, comida e o mais importante... RAT— pera, RATOS??? 🐀💨

Sim! Um modpack onde os verdadeiros heróis são os ratos!
Use suas criaturinhas fofas (e levemente caóticas) para automatizar fazendas, cozinhas e fábricas com Create e outros mods incríveis.

Construa seu império dos queijos, sirva pratos automáticos e prove que os ratos são os melhores trabalhadores do Minecraft! 🧀✨

_⚙️ Aviso: esse modpack pode ser meio pesado — recomendo pelo menos 10 GB de RAM pra não fritar o seu PC (deixe isso pros ratos da cozinha)._

------------------------------------------------------------------

**English**

A modpack full of exploration, farming, villagers, food, and most importantly... RAT— wait, RATS??? 🐀💥

That’s right! A modpack where the true heroes are the rats!
Use your tiny (and slightly chaotic) friends to automate farms, kitchens, and factories with Create and tons of other awesome mods.

Build your cheese empire, serve automated dishes, and prove that rats are the real workforce of Minecraft! 🧀✨

_⚙️ Note: This modpack can be a bit heavy — I recommend at least 10 GB of RAM (don’t worry, the rats will handle the overheating)._

------------------------------------------------------------------

![My channel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcb722e6e49c98cb4e2ad9717efa9ded30898089.jpeg)

Don’t miss out—check my [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@Iskayy_13/featured)!
